title: Nasa ‘on track’ for Artemis II moon mission launch as soon as 1 April - The Guardian
summary_full: Nasa ‘on track’ for Artemis II moon mission launch as soon as 1 April  The GuardianUnanimous vote in key risk assessment has moon mission crew barreling toward a new launch date  CNNNASA says it’s ready for first crewed moon mission in 50 years  YahooNASA to Share Artemis II Flight Readiness Review Update  NASA (.gov)NASA says its Artemis 2 moon rocket is all fixed up. It could launch astronauts to the moon on April 1  Space
